# orgSecretsRotate

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the orgSecretsRotate mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk org-secrets-rotate --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.ownerId <UUID> --input.secretName <String> --input.secretValue <String> --input.namespaceId <UUID> --input.algo <String>
```

## Examples

### Run orgSecretsRotate

```bash
csdk org-secrets-rotate --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.ownerId <UUID> --input.secretName <String> --input.secretValue <String> --input.namespaceId <UUID> --input.algo <String>
```
